last_prompt: Implement the `wreck-it graph` sub-command. Add a `Graph` variant to the Commands enum in cli/src/cli.rs with args `--task-file`, `--format` (mermaid or dot, default mermaid), and `--output`. Create cli/src/graph.rs with a `generate_mermaid` and `generate_dot` function that reads the task list and emits the graph text: nodes labelled with task id and role, edges from each task to its dependents, node style reflecting status (pending/completed/failed/inprogress). Wire the command in cli/src/main.rs. No extra crate dependencies are needed.
